traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: See in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: Advantage on saves against poison; resistance to poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Hit point maximum increases by 1 per level.

optionChoices.name: Tool proficiency
optionChoices.description: Proficiency with one artisan tool of your choice.
